channel.title: Model on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Model on jamesm.blog

item.title: Composer 2.5: Cursor's In-House Model Grows Up
item.description: Cursor's new Composer 2.5 is the first time the company's in-house coding model deserves to be treated as a daily driver rather than a budget fallback. A look at what changed, what it costs, and when to reach for it instead of Claude, GPT-5.5, or Gemini.

item.title: The Open Weight Models Renaissance: Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek
item.description: Open-weight models are no longer the cheap alternative - in 2026 they are credible defaults for many workloads. A walk through where Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek actually sit relative to closed frontier models, and what changed in the last 18 months.

item.title: Running AI Models Locally with Ollama: From Setup to OpenClaw
item.description: A practical guide to Ollama, the platform for running large language models locally, including how to launch OpenClaw and explore its available models.
